purpose: An e-commerce platform that allows users to resell products and access discount codes.
differentiators: Modal overlay for reselling guide and discount offer

entities.name: Discount Code
entities.description: A discount code that can be redeemed.

capabilities.name: Reselling Guide
capabilities.description: Provides a guide for reselling products.

capabilities.name: Discount Code
capabilities.description: Allows users to access and redeem discount codes.

screens.name: Reselling Guide Modal
screens.purpose: Provides a reselling guide and discount offer

screens.name: Discount Code Modal
screens.purpose: Allows users to access and redeem discount codes

frontier.description: Explore the main e-commerce functionalities such as product listings, cart, and checkout.
frontier.rationale: These are typical functionalities for an e-commerce app and should be present.
frontier.search_strategy: Look for product listings, cart, and checkout screens.

anomalies.description: The screen is a modal overlay, which is not a typical screen type for an e-commerce app.
